title: Weight-Depth Functor as Descent Engine

analysis.object: T766: Weight-Depth Functor as Descent Engine depth analysis

weight_functor_t699.description: T699: weight filtration W_k is an EML depth functor

functor_naturality.description: T702: weight functor is natural -- commutes with morphisms

tropical_weight.description: Tropical cycles have tropical weight filtration: W_k^{trop}

functor_preserves_weight.description: Weight functor sends tropical W_k to classical W_k

descent_via_weight.description: If weight functor is full (surjective on morphisms), it provides descent
descent_via_weight.reason: Full functor = every classical cycle is image of tropical

fullness_question.description: Is the weight functor FULL? Fullness requires every morphism to lift
fullness_question.reason: Fullness of tropicalization functor is open in codim >= 2

t766_result.description: T766: Weight functor is faithful (T702) and exact. Fullness is open -- fullness = descent. New equivalence: descent ↔ fullness of weight functor.

analysis.theorem: T766: Weight-Depth Functor as Descent Engine (S1045).

key_theorem: T766: Weight-Depth Functor as Descent Engine (S1045).
